## Definition of Done Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] No new warnings

### Architecture Compliance
- [ ] Files are in correct scope per AGENTS.md
- [ ] No cross-boundary imports
- [ ] Domain has no IO imports

### Documentation
- [ ] Task marked in `SPRINT_CURRENT.md`
- [ ] Daily log updated (`docs/work/daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md`)
- [ ] API contracts updated (if API changed)
- [ ] Error codes updated (if new errors)

### Correctness
- [ ] Idempotency preserved (if applicable)
- [ ] No ambiguous money states
- [ ] Error handling complete
